news.t: Donoghue Forlines Launches DF Tactical 30 ETF (DFTT), Expanding Decade-Long Partnership with Ultimus

holdings.infoBox: DFTT is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 9.61%, Micron Technology at 6.88%, Advanced Micro Devices at 6.34%, Intel at 5.69%, and Eli Lilly and Company at 4.15%.

overview.description: The DF Tactical 30 ETF (DFTT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the DF Risk-Managed Tactical Top 30 index. The fund tracks an equally weighted index of the top 30 US large-cap stocks selected based on price momentum. Security selection uses a regularly monitored exponential moving average (EMA) DFTT was launched on Nov 11, 2025 and is issued by Donoghue Forlines.
